# Name: # Custom partition table for the dongle: keeps the single-app layout
# but carves out a SPIFFS slot so the user can upload their own voice
# announcement via the web UI. Factory app grows from the default 1 MB
# to 1.25 MB (the embedded-audio binary already sits close to 1 MB with
# TLS + SIP + HTTP; 1 MB leaves almost no headroom for future features).
# Remaining 704 KB become SPIFFS — plenty for a 30-second A-law
